examples: She managed to eke out her student loan till the end of the year.
That forced peasant farmers to try to eke a living off steep hillsides.
They are a team that always seemed to eke out victory when the going got tough.
Compaq, using Dell-inspired quick inventory turns, still manages to eke out a profit in PCs.
If they are lucky, they eke out gross profit margins between 20% and 30%.
